title: Mumbai Monsoon Flooding
description: Severe waterlogging on NH-48. Multiple underpasses submerged.

title: Cyclone Warning — Bay of Bengal
description: Deep depression forming off Andhra coast. Heavy rainfall expected along NH-16.

title: NH-44 Gridlock near Nagpur
description: Major pile-up involving 8 trucks. 12km traffic queue.

title: Delhi-Jaipur Highway Congestion
description: Construction work on NH-48 near Manesar. Single-lane for 15km.

title: Farmer Protest Blockade — Punjab
description: Farm unions blocking NH-44 at Ludhiana-Chandigarh stretch.

title: Rath Yatra Procession — Bhubaneswar
description: Annual Rath Yatra. Commercial vehicle restrictions 6AM–6PM.

title: Inter-State Checkpost Delays — Raipur
description: E-way bill verification drive. Average wait: 4 hours per vehicle.

title: Fuel Shortage — Patna Region
description: Diesel supply disruption in Bihar due to refinery maintenance.
